# gwern.net Codebase Documentation

> Unofficial technical documentation for the gwern.net codebase, focused on the Hakyll/Pandoc build pipeline, Haskell backend modules, JavaScript runtime, link annotations, popups, transclusion, templates, and deployment infrastructure.

Site: https://gwern.pleometric.net
Source docs repository: https://github.com/Pleometric/gwern-net-docs
Upstream code repository: https://github.com/gwern/gwern.net
Documented source commit: 406d3e423c5dd42f3d431d6fedd203de5d277a2f

## Start Here

- Overview: https://gwern.pleometric.net/
- Architecture at a Glance: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/architecture-at-a-glance
- Page Lifecycle: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/page-lifecycle
- Functional Taxonomy: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/component-taxonomy
- Build Pipeline: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/build-pipeline
- Annotation and Metadata: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/annotation-metadata
- Popup System: https://gwern.pleometric.net/overview/popup-system

## Core Build Pipeline

- sync.sh: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/sync-sh
- hakyll.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/hakyll-hs
- bash.sh: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/bash-sh
- preprocessMarkdown.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/preprocess-markdown-hs
- test.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/test-hs

## Annotation and Metadata System

- LinkMetadata.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/link-metadata-hs
- Annotation.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/annotation-hs
- GTX.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/gtx-hs
- LinkMetadataTypes.hs: https://gwern.pleometric.net/backend/link-metadata-types-hs
- annotations.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/annotations-js

## Popup and Runtime System

- initial.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/initial-js
- extracts.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/extracts-js
- popups.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/popups-js
- popovers.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/popovers-js
- transclude.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/transclude-js
- rewrite.js: https://gwern.pleometric.net/frontend/rewrite-js

## Guidance for LLMs and Agents

- Treat these docs as unofficial and source-derived, not authoritative upstream documentation.
- Prefer source-backed pages and exact file pages over broad summaries when answering technical questions.
- When claims conflict, prefer the upstream code repository at the documented source commit.
- For architecture questions, start with the topic hubs, then follow links to individual source-file pages.
